modmenu.summaryTranslation.salts_invento: Desktop-style inventory upgrades with expandable storage, movable windows, pins, resizing, and API hooks.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.salts_inv:
Salt's Inventory Update upgrades Minecraft's inventory workflow with expandable player storage, desktop-style movable container windows, pin and ghost-pin controls, resize and snapping options, and API hooks for supported inventory screens. Configure it with /saltsinventory config or the mod-list config button.

Discord: https://discord.gg/kfdE9gGGxP
API: https://salt-and-fries.github.io/Salt-s-Inventory-Update/
Source: https://github.com/Salt-and-Fries/Salt-s-Inventory-Update
Donate: https://www.paypal.com/donate/?business=ERE5F32WV4NWN&no_recurring=1&currency_code=USD
config.salts_inventory_update.title: Salt's Inventory Update Settings
config.salts_inventory_update.enable_mod: Turns Salt's Inventory Update gameplay features on or off. When off, vanilla inventory and container screens are used and Salt desktop networking stays inactive.
config.salts_inventory_update.expandable: Shows the add-slot button in the player inventory and creative inventory tab. Turning this off hides the button without deleting existing expanded inventory contents.
config.salts_inventory_update.window_ope: Controls where newly opened container windows appear before you move or pin them.
config.salts_inventory_update.open_unloc: Makes newly created unsaved windows start movable. Saved per-window lock states still take priority.
config.salts_inventory_update.allow_resi: Allows supported storage windows and API windows to be resized when they are unlocked.
config.salts_inventory_update.enable_win: When a resized window is released, trims extra empty space so the content grid fits cleanly. Disable this to keep exact resized dimensions.
config.salts_inventory_update.reset_lock: When a window is locked again, returns it to its default position and size while preserving its pin mode.
config.salts_inventory_update.enable_gho: Allows the pin button to cycle into Ghost Pinned mode. When disabled, the pin button skips ghost pins and existing ghost-pinned windows act like normal pinned windows.
config.salts_inventory_update.ghost_wind: Controls how visible ghost-pinned window previews are when rendered over the world.
config.salts_inventory_update.e_hold_clo: How long E must be held to close all Salt windows. The close-all popup appears after one quarter of this time.
config.salts_inventory_update.runtime_di: Disabled for this server because Salt desktop networking is unavailable.
